creator: john_m_cooper@yahoo.com
text:
This is the latest version of the XmlAda Library.  It will build with the GNAT-2006 compiler while the current version in ports will not.  It is necessary for another port -- editors/gps which is the GNAT Ada IDE.  A repo-copy of textproc/xmlada is probably appropriate.

How-To-Repeat: 

n/a
